ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "total_matches_played" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played by the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "current_captain" TEXT /* Name of the current captain */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the current coach */,
  "home_ground" TEXT /* Name of the team's home ground */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team playing the match */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue of the match */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., Test, ODI, T20) */,
  "match_result_margin" TEXT /* Margin of the match result (e.g., 10 runs, 5 wickets) */,
  "match_man_of_the_match" TEXT /* Player who was the man of the match */,
  "toss_winner" TEXT /* Team that won the toss */,
  "toss_decision" TEXT /* Decision made by the toss winner (e.g., bat, field) */,
  "match_conditions" TEXT /* Weather and pitch conditions during the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_stats" (
  "match_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match statistic entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Runs scored by the player in the match */,
  "wickets_taken" INTEGER /* Wickets taken by the player in the match */,
  "balls_faced" INTEGER /* Balls faced by the player in the match */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Home runs hit by the player in the match */,
  "non_home_runs" INTEGER /* Non-home runs hit by the player in the match */,
  "strike_rate" REAL /* Strike rate of the player in the match */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Batting average of the player in the match */,
  "overs_bowled" REAL /* Number of overs bowled by the player in the match */,
  "maidens" INTEGER /* Number of maiden overs bowled by the player in the match */,
  "economy_rate" REAL /* Economy rate of the player in the match */,
  "highest_score" INTEGER /* Highest score made by the player in the match */,
  "best_bowling" TEXT /* Best bowling figures in the match */,
  "fielding_dismissals" INTEGER /* Number of fielding dismissals (catches, stumpings, run-outs) by the player in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "home_run_hitting_ability" REAL /* Home run hitting ability of the player */,
  "milestone_reaching_ability" REAL /* Milestone reaching ability of the player */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Batting average of the player */,
  "strike_rate" REAL /* Strike rate of the player */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Cluster ID of the player based on performance metrics */,
  "career_high_strike_rate" REAL /* Player's highest strike rate in a single match */,
  "career_high_bowling_average" REAL /* Player's lowest bowling average in a single match */,
  "career_high_economy_rate" REAL /* Player's lowest economy rate in a single match */,
  "career_high_fielding_dismissals" INTEGER /* Player's highest number of fielding dismissals in a single match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES clusters ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clusters" (
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cluster */,
  "cluster_name" TEXT /* Name of the cluster */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cluster */,
  "metric_thresholds" TEXT /* Thresholds used to define the cluster (e.g., strike rate > 80, batting average > 40) */,
  "performance_trend" TEXT /* Trend of performance within the cluster (e.g., improving, declining) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access event occurred */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, coach, analyst) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* User's permissions within the system (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
